title: Basic JavaScript Service Workers
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Service Workers. Focus on implementing Service Worker lifecycle (install, activate, fetch) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Service Workers
description: Create a function that uses Service Worker lifecycle (install, activate, fetch) and Cache API together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Service Workers Project
description: Build a small application that applies Service Worker lifecycle (install, activate, fetch), Cache API, Caching strategies (cache-first, network-first) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Service Workers
description: The following code has bugs related to Service Worker lifecycle (install, activate, fetch). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Service Workers
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Service Worker lifecycle (install, activate, fetch) and Cache API.
